mapper.select: SELECT ca.channel_name AS `key`, ca.channel_name AS label, CASE WHEN COUNT(co.order_id) > 0 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'PLANNED' END AS syncStatus, COUNT(CASE WHEN co.invoice_no IS NULL AND co.order_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS pendingOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(co.created_at) = CURDATE() THEN 1 END) AS todayImported, MAX(co.created_at) AS lastSyncedAt FROM channel_api ca LEFT JOIN channel_order co ON co.seller_id = ca.seller_id AND co.order_channel = ca.channel_name WHERE ca.seller_id = #{sellerId} GROUP BY ca.channel_name
